name: vexpo
description: The all-in-one starting point for shipping a real Expo app. Native SwiftUI, Convex, Better Auth, Resend, EAS top-to-bottom.

scripts.test:all: bun run test && bun run test:packages:e2e
scripts.link:dev:
bun --filter vexpo build && cd packages/vexpo && bun link && cd ../../templates/default && bun link vexpo && echo '
linked. now `bun run setup` from templates/default routes to the local vexpo build.
run `bun --filter vexpo build` whenever you change cli source.
'

author: Ramon Claudio <hello@ramonclaudio.com> (https://github.com/ramonclaudio)
